prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical fashion brand launch collage poster for GORDEN INDUSTRY, with a bold streetwear e-commerce look, mixing product photography, paper textures, handwritten doodles, and orange-black typography.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 poster, off-white warm paper background with subtle grain and light wrinkles. Use a modern editorial layout with cutout objects, taped paper scraps, scribbles, and sticker-like labels.

Layout: At the top, place a huge two-line headline: the first line reads “GORDEN” in heavy black uppercase sans serif, and the second line reads “INDUSTRY” in oversized bright orange uppercase sans serif. The headline should dominate the upper half and slightly overlap a translucent taped paper strip. Keep the design airy but energetic, with asymmetrical spacing.

Main visual elements: Include exactly 5 product/lifestyle elements: 1 folded black sweatshirt at lower left-middle with a small orange neck label, 1 black rectangular shipping box near the center-right under the headline with the brand name printed in white, 1 cutout full-body fashion model wearing a white hoodie, black cargo pants, and black-and-white sneakers on the right side, 1 large orange shopping bag at bottom left with handles, and 1 three-swatch fabric sample strip at bottom right. The model’s face may be softly blurred or obscured for an editorial mockup look.

Text and labels: Add exactly 7 visible text components: 1 main headline “GORDEN INDUSTRY”, 1 circular orange stamp reading “EST. ORIGINAL”, 1 black pill label reading “F/W 26 DROP”, 1 handwritten script slogan reading Gorden Yeah!, 1 size/material card reading “SIZE / S  M  L  XL  XXL” and “MATERIAL / COTTON · POLY · FROST”, 1 black pill near the shopping bag reading “NEW IN”, 1 orange price tag reading $48, and 1 small outlined button near the bag reading “TAP TO SHOP”. Use clean readable English typography for all printed text.

Doodles and decorative details: Add exactly 8 small hand-drawn accent doodles: 1 black lightning bolt in the upper left, 1 black hanging price-tag sketch near the top, 1 orange smiley face above the headline, 1 small orange heart on the G, 1 orange starburst in the upper right, 1 long black looping scribble line running through the middle and around the model, 1 tiny price-tag sketch near the bottom center, and 1 small orange heart plus black lightning accent near the lower center. Include transparent tape pieces over the headline area and above/below the fabric swatches, plus torn-paper strips behind the sweatshirt and along the center.

Color palette and style: Use primarily black, bright orange, cream white, and charcoal gray. Make the typography bold and high-contrast, with realistic product mockup lighting and soft shadows. The overall style should feel like a trendy streetwear drop announcement, Instagram fashion shop poster, magazine collage, clean but playful.

Constraints: Preserve the exact count of 5 product/lifestyle elements, 7 text components, and 8 doodle accents. Keep all text sharp and legible. Do not add extra logos, watermarks, people, products, or unreadable filler text.
